tEn: Convolutional Neural Networks on Graphs with Fast Localized Spectral Filtering
tZh: 基于快速局部谱滤波的图卷积神经网络
sEn: We generalize CNNs to graphs using spectral graph theory, achieving linear complexity and universal applicability.
sZh: 我们将卷积神经网络从规则网格推广到图结构，利用谱图理论设计快速局部滤波器，保持线性复杂度并适用于任意图。
absEn: In this work, we are interested in generalizing convolutional neural networks (CNNs) from low-dimensional regular grids, where image, video and speech are represented, to high-dimensional irregular domains, such as social networks, brain connectomes or words' embedding, represented by graphs. We present a formulation of CNNs in the context of spectral graph theory, which provides the necessary mathematical background and efficient numerical schemes to design fast localized convolutional filters on graphs. Importantly, the proposed technique offers the same linear computational complexity and constant learning complexity as classical CNNs, while being universal to any graph structure. Experiments on MNIST and 20NEWS demonstrate the ability of this novel deep learning system to learn local, stationary, and compositional features on graphs.
absZh: 本文旨在将卷积神经网络从低维规则网格（如图像、视频和语音）推广到高维不规则域（如社交网络、脑连接组或词嵌入），这些域由图表示。我们基于谱图理论提出了CNN的一种形式化方法，提供了必要的数学背景和高效的数值方案，以在图上的设计快速局部卷积滤波器。重要的是，所提出的技术具有与经典CNN相同的线性计算复杂度和恒定的学习复杂度，同时适用于任何图结构。在MNIST和20NEWS上的实验表明，这种新型深度学习系统能够学习图上的局部、平稳和组合特征。

contrib.en: Proposes a spectral graph CNN formulation using Chebyshev polynomials for fast localized filtering.
contrib.zh: 提出使用切比雪夫多项式的谱图CNN公式，实现快速局部滤波。

contrib.en: Achieves linear computational complexity O(K|E|) and constant learning complexity O(K) like classical CNNs.
contrib.zh: 实现线性计算复杂度O(K|E|)和恒定学习复杂度O(K)，与经典CNN相同。

contrib.en: Introduces an efficient graph pooling strategy via balanced binary tree rearrangement.
contrib.zh: 通过平衡二叉树重排引入高效的图池化策略。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strict localization of spectral filters with K-hop support.
contrib.zh: 证明谱滤波器具有K跳支撑的严格局部性。

contrib.en: Shows competitive performance on MNIST and 20NEWS datasets.
contrib.zh: 在MNIST和20NEWS数据集上展示出有竞争力的性能。

contrib.en: Provides open-source TensorFlow code for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 提供开源TensorFlow代码以确保可复现性。

limits.en: Spectral filters are isotropic, lacking orientation sensitivity on grids.
limits.zh: 谱滤波器是各向同性的，在网格上缺乏方向敏感性。

limits.en: Performance heavily depends on the quality of the input graph construction.
limits.zh: 性能严重依赖于输入图构建的质量。

limits.en: Fake nodes from coarsening increase dimensionality and computational cost.
limits.zh: 粗化产生的虚拟节点增加了维度和计算成本。

limits.en: Model not tested on large-scale graphs with millions of nodes.
limits.zh: 模型未在百万节点的大规模图上测试。

limits.en: Graph construction for text uses word2vec embeddings which may not be optimal.
limits.zh: 文本的图构建使用word2vec嵌入，可能并非最优。

items.en: In this work, we are interested in generalizing convolutional neural networks (CNNs) from low-dimensional regular grids, where image, video and speech are represented, to high-dimensional irregular domains, such as social networks, brain connectomes or words’ embedding, represented by graphs. We present a formulation of CNNs in the context of spectral graph theory, which provides the necessary mathematical background and efficient numerical schemes to design fast localized convolutional filters on graphs. Importantly, the proposed technique offers the same linear computational complexity and constant learning complexity as classical CNNs, while being universal to any graph structure. Experiments on MNIST and 20NEWS demonstrate the ability of this novel deep learning system to learn local, stationary, and compositional features on graphs.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们感兴趣的是将卷积神经网络（CNN）从低维规则网格（图像、视频和语音在其中表示）推广到高维不规则域，例如社交网络、脑连接组或词嵌入，这些域由图表示。我们在谱图理论的背景下提出了CNN的一种公式，该理论提供了必要的数学背景和高效的数值方案，以设计图上快速的局部卷积滤波器。重要的是，所提出的技术提供了与经典CNN相同的线性计算复杂度和恒定的学习复杂度，同时适用于任何图结构。在MNIST和20NEWS上的实验证明了这种新型深度学习系统学习图上局部、平稳和组合特征的能力。

items.en: Convolutional neural networks [19] offer an efficient architecture to extract highly meaningful statistical patterns in large-scale and high-dimensional datasets. The ability of CNNs to learn local stationary structures and compose them to form multi-scale hierarchical patterns has led to breakthroughs in image, video, and sound recognition tasks [18]. Precisely, CNNs extract the local stationarity property of the input data or signals by revealing local features that are shared across the data domain. These similar features are identified with localized convolutional filters or kernels, which are learned from the data. Convolutional filters are shift- or translation-invariant filters, meaning they are able to recognize identical features independently of their spatial locations. Localized kernels or compactly supported filters refer to filters that extract local features independently of the input data size, with a support size that can be much smaller than the input size.
items.zh: 卷积神经网络[19]提供了一种高效的架构，用于从大规模和高维数据集中提取高度有意义的统计模式。CNN学习局部平稳结构并将其组合成多尺度层次模式的能力已在图像、视频和声音识别任务中取得了突破[18]。确切地说，CNN通过揭示数据域中共享的局部特征来提取输入数据或信号的局部平稳性。这些相似的特征通过局部卷积滤波器或核来识别，这些滤波器或核是从数据中学习得到的。卷积滤波器是平移不变滤波器，意味着它们能够识别相同特征，无论其空间位置如何。局部核或紧支撑滤波器是指提取局部特征且与输入数据大小无关的滤波器，其支撑大小可以远小于输入大小。

items.en: User data on social networks, gene data on biological regulatory networks, log data on telecommunication networks, or text documents on word embeddings are important examples of data lying on irregular or non-Euclidean domains that can be structured with graphs, which are universal representations of heterogeneous pairwise relationships. Graphs can encode complex geometric structures and can be studied with strong mathematical tools such as spectral graph theory [6].
items.zh: 社交网络上的用户数据、生物调控网络上的基因数据、电信网络上的日志数据或词嵌入上的文本文档是位于不规则或非欧几里得域上的重要数据示例，这些域可以用图来结构化，图是异构成对关系的通用表示。图可以编码复杂的几何结构，并可以用强大的数学工具（如谱图理论[6]）进行研究。

items.en: A generalization of CNNs to graphs is not straightforward as the convolution and pooling operators are only defined for regular grids. This makes this extension challenging, both theoretically and implementation-wise. The major bottleneck of generalizing CNNs to graphs, and one of the primary goals of this work, is the definition of localized graph filters which are efficient to evaluate and learn. Precisely, the main contributions of this work are summarized below.
items.zh: 将CNN推广到图并非直接可行，因为卷积和池化算子仅定义在规则网格上。这使得这一扩展在理论和实现上都充满挑战。将CNN推广到图的主要瓶颈（也是本工作的主要目标之一）是定义高效评估和学习的局部图滤波器。确切地说，本工作的主要贡献总结如下。

items.en: Spectral formulation. A spectral graph theoretical formulation of CNNs on graphs built on established tools in graph signal processing (GSP). [31].
items.zh: 谱公式。基于图信号处理（GSP）[31]的成熟工具，建立了图上CNN的谱图理论公式。

items.en: Strictly localized filters. Enhancing [4], the proposed spectral filters are provable to be strictly localized in a ball of radius K𝐾K, i.e. K𝐾K hops from the central vertex.
items.zh: 严格局部滤波器。改进了[4]，所提出的谱滤波器可证明严格局部化在半径为K的球内，即从中心顶点出发的K跳。

items.en: Low computational complexity. The evaluation complexity of our filters is linear w.r.t. the filters support’s size K𝐾K and the number of edges |ℰ|ℰ|\mathcal{E}|. Importantly, as most real-world graphs are highly sparse, we have |ℰ|≪n2much-less-thanℰsuperscript𝑛2|\mathcal{E}|\ll n^{2} and |ℰ|=k​nℰ𝑘𝑛|\mathcal{E}|=kn for the widespread k𝑘k-nearest neighbor (NN) graphs, leading to a linear complexity w.r.t the input data size n𝑛n. Moreover, this method avoids the Fourier basis altogether, thus the expensive eigenvalue decomposition (EVD) necessary to compute it as well as the need to store the basis, a matrix of size n2superscript𝑛2n^{2}. That is especially relevant when working with limited GPU memory. Besides the data, our method only requires to store the Laplacian, a sparse matrix of |ℰ|ℰ|\mathcal{E}| non-zero values.
items.zh: 低计算复杂度。我们滤波器的评估复杂度关于滤波器支撑大小K和边数|ℰ|是线性的。重要的是，由于大多数真实世界图是高度稀疏的，我们有|ℰ|≪n²，对于广泛使用的k近邻（NN）图，|ℰ|=kn，导致关于输入数据大小n的线性复杂度。此外，该方法完全避免了傅里叶基，因此避免了计算它所需的昂贵特征值分解（EVD）以及存储该基（一个大小为n²的矩阵）的需要。这在处理有限的GPU内存时尤其重要。除了数据，我们的方法只需要存储拉普拉斯矩阵，一个具有|ℰ|个非零值的稀疏矩阵。

items.en: Efficient pooling. We propose an efficient pooling strategy on graphs which, after a rearrangement of the vertices as a binary tree structure, is analog to pooling of 1D signals.
items.zh: 高效池化。我们提出了一种高效的图池化策略，在将顶点重新排列为二叉树结构后，该策略类似于一维信号的池化。

items.en: Experimental results. We present multiple experiments that ultimately show that our formulation is (i) a useful model, (ii) computationally efficient and (iii) superior both in accuracy and complexity to the pioneer spectral graph CNN introduced in [4]. We also show that our graph formulation performs similarly to a classical CNNs on MNIST and study the impact of various graph constructions on performance. The TensorFlow [1] code to reproduce our results and apply the model to other data is available as an open-source software.111https://github.com/mdeff/cnn_graph
items.zh: 实验结果。我们提出了多个实验，最终表明我们的公式（i）是一个有用的模型，（ii）计算高效，并且（iii）在准确性和复杂度上都优于[4]中引入的先驱谱图CNN。我们还展示了我们的图公式在MNIST上的表现与经典CNN相似，并研究了各种图构造对性能的影响。重现我们的结果并将模型应用于其他数据的TensorFlow[1]代码作为开源软件提供。

items.capZh: 图1：图上CNN的架构以及（图）卷积层的四个组成部分。

items.en: Generalizing CNNs to graphs requires three fundamental steps: (i) the design of localized convolutional filters on graphs, (ii) a graph coarsening procedure that groups together similar vertices and (iii) a graph pooling operation that trades spatial resolution for higher filter resolution.
items.zh: 将CNN推广到图需要三个基本步骤：（i）设计图上的局部卷积滤波器，（ii）将相似顶点分组在一起的图粗化过程，以及（iii）用空间分辨率换取更高滤波器分辨率的图池化操作。

full.secZh: 2.1 学习快速局部谱滤波器

items.en: There are two strategies to define convolutional filters; either from a spatial approach or from a spectral approach. By construction, spatial approaches provide filter localization via the finite size of the kernel. However, although graph convolution in the spatial domain is conceivable, it faces the challenge of matching local neighborhoods, as pointed out in [4]. Consequently, there is no unique mathematical definition of translation on graphs from a spatial perspective. On the other side, a spectral approach provides a well-defined localization operator on graphs via convolutions with a Kronecker delta implemented in the spectral domain [31]. The convolution theorem [22] defines convolutions as linear operators that diagonalize in the Fourier basis (represented by the eigenvectors of the Laplacian operator). However, a filter defined in the spectral domain is not naturally localized and translations are costly due to the 𝒪​(n2)𝒪superscript𝑛2\mathcal{O}(n^{2}) multiplication with the graph Fourier basis. Both limitations can however be overcome with a special choice of filter parametrization.
items.zh: 定义卷积滤波器有两种策略：空间方法或谱方法。通过构造，空间方法通过核的有限大小提供滤波器局部化。然而，尽管空间域中的图卷积是可以想象的，但它面临着匹配局部邻域的挑战，如[4]所指出的。因此，从空间角度来看，图上没有唯一的平移数学定义。另一方面，谱方法通过谱域中实现的克罗内克δ函数的卷积，提供了图上定义良好的局部化算子[31]。卷积定理[22]将卷积定义为在傅里叶基（由拉普拉斯算子的特征向量表示）中对角化的线性算子。然而，在谱域中定义的滤波器不是自然局部化的，并且由于与图傅里叶基的O(n²)乘法，平移成本很高。然而，这两个限制可以通过特殊的滤波器参数化选择来克服。

A signal x:𝒱→ℝ:𝑥→𝒱ℝx:\mathcal{V}\rightarrow\mathbb{R} defined on the nodes of the graph may be regarded as a vector x∈ℝn𝑥superscriptℝ𝑛x\in\mathbb{R}^{n} where xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} is the value of x𝑥x at the it​hsuperscript𝑖𝑡ℎi^{th} node. The graph Fourier transform of a signal x∈ℝn𝑥superscriptℝ𝑛x\in\mathbb{R}^{n} is then defined as x^=UT​x∈ℝn^𝑥superscript𝑈𝑇𝑥superscriptℝ𝑛\hat{x}=U^{T}x\in\mathbb{R}^{n}, and its inverse as x=U​x^𝑥𝑈^𝑥x=U\hat{x} [31]. A solution to this problem is to parametrize gθ​(L)subscript𝑔𝜃𝐿g_{\theta}(L) as a polynomial function that can be computed recursively from L𝐿L, as K𝐾K multiplications by a sparse L𝐿L costs 𝒪​(K​|ℰ|)≪𝒪​(n2)much-less-than𝒪𝐾ℰ𝒪superscript𝑛2\mathcal{O}(K|\mathcal{E}|)\ll\mathcal{O}(n^{2}). One such polynomial, traditionally used in GSP to approximate kernels (like wavelets), is the Chebyshev expansion [12]. Another option, the Lanczos algorithm [33], which constructs an orthonormal basis of the Krylov subspace 𝒦K​(L,x)=span{x,L​x,…,LK−1​x}subscript𝒦𝐾𝐿𝑥span𝑥𝐿𝑥…superscript𝐿𝐾1𝑥\mathcal{K}_{K}(L,x)=\operatorname*{span}\{x,Lx,\ldots,L^{K-1}x\}, seems attractive because of the coefficients’ independence. It is however more convoluted and thus left as a future work.
items.zh: 虽然我们已经展示了如何学习具有K个参数的局部化滤波器，但将信号x滤波为y=U g_θ(Λ) U^T x的成本仍然很高，需要O(n²)次操作，因为需要与傅里叶基U相乘。解决这个问题的一种方法是将g_θ(L)参数化为一个多项式函数，该函数可以从L递归计算，因为与稀疏L的K次乘法成本为O(K|E|)≪O(n²)。一种这样的多项式，传统上在GSP中用于近似核（如小波），是切比雪夫展开[12]。另一种选择是兰佐斯算法[33]，它构造了Krylov子空间K_K(L,x)=span{x, Lx, ..., L^{K-1}x}的标准正交基，由于系数的独立性似乎很有吸引力。然而它更复杂，因此留作未来工作。

items.en: The pooling operation requires meaningful neighborhoods on graphs, where similar vertices are clustered together. Doing this for multiple layers is equivalent to a multi-scale clustering of the graph that preserves local geometric structures. It is however known that graph clustering is NP-hard [5] and that approximations must be used. While there exist many clustering techniques, e.g. the popular spectral clustering [21], we are most interested in multilevel clustering algorithms where each level produces a coarser graph which corresponds to the data domain seen at a different resolution. Moreover, clustering techniques that reduce the size of the graph by a factor two at each level offers a precise control on the coarsening and pooling size. In this work, we make use of the coarsening phase of the Graclus multilevel clustering algorithm [9], which has been shown to be extremely efficient at clustering a large variety of graphs. Algebraic multigrid techniques on graphs [28] and the Kron reduction [32] are two methods worth exploring in future works.
items.zh: 池化操作需要在图上定义有意义的邻域，其中相似的顶点被聚类在一起。在多层中执行此操作相当于对图进行多尺度聚类，以保留局部几何结构。然而，众所周知图聚类是NP难的[5]，必须使用近似方法。虽然存在许多聚类技术，例如流行的谱聚类[21]，但我们最感兴趣的是多级聚类算法，其中每一级产生一个更粗糙的图，对应于在不同分辨率下看到的数据域。此外，在每一级将图的大小减少一半的聚类技术提供了对粗化和池化大小的精确控制。在这项工作中，我们使用了Graclus多级聚类算法[9]的粗化阶段，该算法已被证明在聚类各种图时非常高效。图上的代数多重网格技术[28]和Kron约简[32]是未来工作中值得探索的两种方法。

items.en: Graclus [9], built on Metis [16], uses a greedy algorithm to compute successive coarser versions of a given graph and is able to minimize several popular spectral clustering objectives, from which we chose the normalized cut [30]. Graclus’ greedy rule consists, at each coarsening level, in picking an unmarked vertex i𝑖i and matching it with one of its unmarked neighbors j𝑗j that maximizes the local normalized cut Wi​j​(1/di+1/dj)subscript𝑊𝑖𝑗1subscript𝑑𝑖1subscript𝑑𝑗W_{ij}(1/d_{i}+1/d_{j}). The two matched vertices are then marked and the coarsened weights are set as the sum of their weights. The matching is repeated until all nodes have been explored. This is an very fast coarsening scheme which divides the number of nodes by approximately two (there may exist a few singletons, non-matched nodes) from one level to the next coarser level.
items.zh: Graclus[9]基于Metis[16]，使用贪心算法计算给定图的连续更粗糙版本，并能够最小化几种流行的谱聚类目标，我们从中选择了归一化割[30]。Graclus的贪心规则是，在每个粗化级别，选择一个未标记的顶点i，并将其与一个未标记的邻居j匹配，使得局部归一化割W_{ij}(1/d_i+1/d_j)最大化。然后标记这两个匹配的顶点，并将粗化后的权重设为其权重之和。重复匹配直到所有节点都被探索。这是一种非常快速的粗化方案，从一级到下一级更粗糙的级别，节点数量大约减少一半（可能存在少数孤立节点，即未匹配的节点）。

Let us carry out a max pooling of size 4 (or two poolings of size 2) on a signal x∈ℝ8𝑥superscriptℝ8x\in\mathbb{R}^{8} living on 𝒢0subscript𝒢0\mathcal{G}_{0}, the finest graph given as input. Note that it originally possesses n0=|𝒱0|=8subscript𝑛0subscript𝒱08n_{0}=|\mathcal{V}_{0}|=8 vertices, arbitrarily ordered. Nodes in 𝒱2subscript𝒱2\mathcal{V}_{2} are then arbitrarily ordered and nodes in 𝒱1subscript𝒱1\mathcal{V}_{1} and 𝒱0subscript𝒱0\mathcal{V}_{0} are ordered consequently. At that point the arrangement of vertices in 𝒱0subscript𝒱0\mathcal{V}_{0} permits a regular 1D pooling on x∈ℝ12𝑥superscriptℝ12x\in\mathbb{R}^{12} such that z=[max⁡(x0,x1),max⁡(x4,x5,x6),max⁡(x8,x9,x10)]∈ℝ3𝑧subscript𝑥0subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥4subscript𝑥5subscript𝑥6subscript𝑥8subscript𝑥9subscript𝑥10superscriptℝ3z=[\max(x_{0},x_{1}),\max(x_{4},x_{5},x_{6}),\max(x_{8},x_{9},x_{10})]\in\mathbb{R}^{3}, where the signal components x2,x3,x7,x11subscript𝑥2subscript𝑥3subscript𝑥7subscript𝑥11x_{2},x_{3},x_{7},x_{11} are set to a neutral value.
items.capZh: 图2：图粗化和池化示例。让我们对信号x∈ℝ^8（存在于𝒢_0上，即输入的最细图）执行大小为4的最大池化（或两次大小为2的池化）。注意，它最初有n_0=|𝒱_0|=8个顶点，任意排序。对于大小为4的池化，需要两次大小为2的粗化：让Graclus给出大小为n_1=|𝒱_1|=5的𝒢_1，然后大小为n_2=|𝒱_2|=3的𝒢_2，即最粗的图。因此大小设置为n_2=3，n_1=6，n_0=12，并向𝒱_1（1个节点）和𝒱_0（4个节点）添加假节点（蓝色），以与孤立节点（橙色）配对，使得每个节点恰好有两个子节点。然后任意排序𝒱_2中的节点，并相应地排序𝒱_1和𝒱_0中的节点。此时，𝒱_0中顶点的排列允许对x∈ℝ^12进行常规的一维池化，使得z=[max(x_0,x_1), max(x_4,x_5,x_6), max(x_8,x_9,x_10)]∈ℝ^3，其中信号分量x_2,x_3,x_7,x_11被设置为中性值。

items.en: Pooling operations are carried out many times and must be efficient. After coarsening, the vertices of the input graph and its coarsened versions are not arranged in any meaningful way. Hence, a direct application of the pooling operation would need a table to store all matched vertices. That would result in a memory inefficient, slow, and hardly parallelizable implementation. It is however possible to arrange the vertices such that a graph pooling operation becomes as efficient as a 1D pooling. We proceed in two steps: (i) create a balanced binary tree and (ii) rearrange the vertices. After coarsening, each node has either two children, if it was matched at the finer level, or one, if it was not, i.e the node was a singleton. From the coarsest to finest level, fake nodes, i.e. disconnected nodes, are added to pair with the singletons such that each node has two children. This structure is a balanced binary tree: (i) regular nodes (and singletons) either have two regular nodes (e.g. level 1 vertex 0 in Figure 2) or (ii) one singleton and a fake node as children (e.g. level 2 vertex 0), and (iii) fake nodes always have two fake nodes as children (e.g. level 1 vertex 1). Input signals are initialized with a neutral value at the fake nodes, e.g. 0 when using a ReLU activation with max pooling. Because these nodes are disconnected, filtering does not impact the initial neutral value. While those fake nodes do artificially increase the dimensionality thus the computational cost, we found that, in practice, the number of singletons left by Graclus is quite low. Arbitrarily ordering the nodes at the coarsest level, then propagating this ordering to the finest levels, i.e. node k𝑘k has nodes 2​k2𝑘2k and 2​k+12𝑘12k+1 as children, produces a regular ordering in the finest level. Regular in the sense that adjacent nodes are hierarchically merged at coarser levels. Pooling such a rearranged graph signal is analog to pooling a regular 1D signal. Figure 2 shows an example of the whole process. This regular arrangement makes the operation very efficient and satisfies parallel architectures such as GPUs as memory accesses are local, i.e. matched nodes do not have to be fetched.
items.zh: 池化操作需要多次执行，并且必须高效。粗化后，输入图及其粗化版本的顶点没有以任何有意义的方式排列。因此，直接应用池化操作需要一个表来存储所有匹配的顶点。这将导致内存效率低、速度慢且难以并行化的实现。然而，可以排列顶点，使得图池化操作变得像一维池化一样高效。我们分两步进行：(i) 创建平衡二叉树，(ii) 重新排列顶点。粗化后，每个节点要么有两个子节点（如果在更细级别被匹配），要么有一个子节点（如果没有，即该节点是孤立节点）。从最粗到最细的级别，添加假节点（即断开连接的节点）与孤立节点配对，使得每个节点有两个子节点。这种结构是一棵平衡二叉树：(i) 常规节点（和孤立节点）要么有两个常规节点作为子节点（例如图2中级别1的顶点0），要么(ii) 一个孤立节点和一个假节点作为子节点（例如级别2的顶点0），以及(iii) 假节点总是有两个假节点作为子节点（例如级别1的顶点1）。输入信号在假节点处用中性值初始化，例如在使用ReLU激活和最大池化时设为0。由于这些节点是断开的，滤波不会影响初始中性值。虽然这些假节点确实人为增加了维度从而增加了计算成本，但我们发现，在实践中，Graclus留下的孤立节点数量相当少。任意排序最粗级别的节点，然后将此排序传播到最细级别，即节点k有子节点2k和2k+1，在最细级别产生规则排序。规则意味着相邻节点在更粗级别被分层合并。对这种重新排列后的图信号进行池化类似于对规则的一维信号进行池化。图2展示了整个过程的一个示例。这种规则排列使得操作非常高效，并满足并行架构（如GPU），因为内存访问是局部的，即匹配的节点不必被获取。

items.en: The emerging field of GSP aims at bridging the gap between signal processing and spectral graph theory [6, 3, 21], a blend between graph theory and harmonic analysis. A goal is to generalize fundamental analysis operations for signals from regular grids to irregular structures embodied by graphs. We refer the reader to [31] for an introduction of the field. Standard operations on grids such as convolution, translation, filtering, dilatation, modulation or downsampling do not extend directly to graphs and thus require new mathematical definitions while keeping the original intuitive concepts. In this context, the authors of [12, 8, 10] revisited the construction of wavelet operators on graphs and techniques to perform mutli-scale pyramid transforms on graphs were proposed in [32, 27]. The works of [34, 25, 26] redefined uncertainty principles on graphs and showed that while intuitive concepts may be lost, enhanced localization principles can be derived.
items.zh: GSP这一新兴领域旨在弥合信号处理与谱图理论之间的差距[6, 3, 21]，是图论与调和分析的结合。其目标是将规则网格上的基本分析操作推广到由图表示的irregular结构。我们推荐读者参考[31]了解该领域的介绍。网格上的标准操作，如卷积、平移、滤波、膨胀、调制或下采样，不能直接扩展到图，因此需要新的数学定义，同时保留原始直观概念。在此背景下，[12, 8, 10]的作者重新审视了图上小波算子的构建，[32, 27]提出了在图上进行多尺度金字塔变换的技术。[34, 25, 26]的工作重新定义了图上的不确定性原理，并表明虽然直观概念可能丢失，但可以推导出增强的定位原理。

items.en: The Graph Neural Network framework [29], simplified in [20], was designed to embed each node in an Euclidean space with a RNN and use those embeddings as features for classification or regression of nodes or graphs. By setting their transition function f𝑓f as a simple diffusion instead of a neural net with a recursive relation, their state vector becomes s=f​(x)=W​x𝑠𝑓𝑥𝑊𝑥s=f(x)=Wx. Their point-wise output function gθsubscript𝑔𝜃g_{\theta} can further be set as x^=gθ​(s,x)=θ​(s−D​x)+x=θ​L​x+x^𝑥subscript𝑔𝜃𝑠𝑥𝜃𝑠𝐷𝑥𝑥𝜃𝐿𝑥𝑥\hat{x}=g_{\theta}(s,x)=\theta(s-Dx)+x=\theta Lx+x instead of another neural net. The Chebyshev polynomials of degree K𝐾K can then be obtained with a K𝐾K-layer GNN, to be followed by a non-linear layer and a graph pooling operation. Our model can thus be interpreted as multiple layers of diffusions and node-local operations.
items.zh: 图神经网络框架[29]（在[20]中简化）旨在使用RNN将每个节点嵌入欧几里得空间，并将这些嵌入用作节点或图分类或回归的特征。通过将其转移函数f设置为简单的扩散而不是具有递归关系的神经网络，其状态向量变为s=f(x)=Wx。其逐点输出函数g_θ可以进一步设置为x̂=g_θ(s,x)=θ(s-Dx)+x=θLx+x，而不是另一个神经网络。然后，可以通过K层GNN获得K阶切比雪夫多项式，随后是非线性层和图池化操作。因此，我们的模型可以解释为多层扩散和节点局部操作。

items.en: The works of [11, 7] introduced the concept of constructing a local receptive field to reduce the number of learned parameters. The idea is to group together features based upon a measure of similarity such as to select a limited number of connections between two successive layers. While this model reduces the number of parameters by exploiting the locality assumption, it did not attempt to exploit any stationarity property, i.e. no weight-sharing strategy. The authors of [4] used this idea for their spatial formulation of graph CNNs. They use a weighted graph to define the local neighborhood and compute a multiscale clustering of the graph for the pooling operation. Inducing weight sharing in a spatial construction is however challenging, as it requires to select and order the neighborhoods when a problem-specific ordering (spatial, temporal, or otherwise) is missing.
items.zh: [11, 7]的工作引入了构建局部感受野以减少学习参数数量的概念。其思想是基于相似性度量将特征分组，以选择两个连续层之间的有限连接。虽然该模型通过利用局部性假设减少了参数数量，但它并未尝试利用任何平稳性属性，即没有权重共享策略。[4]的作者将这一思想用于其图CNN的空间公式。他们使用加权图定义局部邻域，并计算图的多尺度聚类以进行池化操作。然而，在空间构造中引入权重共享具有挑战性，因为它需要选择和排序邻域，而问题特定的排序（空间、时间或其他）是缺失的。

items.en: A spatial generalization of CNNs to 3D-meshes, a class of smooth low-dimensional non-Euclidean spaces, was proposed in [23]. The authors used geodesic polar coordinates to define the convolution on mesh patches, and formulated a deep learning architecture which allows comparison across different manifolds. They obtained state-of-the-art results for 3D shape recognition.
items.zh: [23]提出了一种将CNN推广到3D网格（一类光滑的低维非欧几里得空间）的空间方法。作者使用测地极坐标定义网格块上的卷积，并制定了一种深度学习架构，允许在不同流形之间进行比较。他们在3D形状识别方面取得了最先进的结果。

items.en: where B∈ℝn×K𝐵superscriptℝ𝑛𝐾B\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times K} is the cubic B-spline basis and the parameter θ∈ℝK𝜃superscriptℝ𝐾\theta\in\mathbb{R}^{K} is a vector of control points. They later proposed a strategy to learn the graph structure from the data and applied the model to image recognition, text categorization and bioinformatics [13]. This approach does however not scale up due to the necessary multiplications by the graph Fourier basis U𝑈U. Despite the cost of computing this matrix, which requires an EVD on the graph Laplacian, the dominant cost is the need to multiply the data by this matrix twice (forward and inverse Fourier transforms) at a cost of 𝒪​(n2)𝒪superscript𝑛2\mathcal{O}(n^{2}) operations per forward and backward pass, a computational bottleneck already identified by the authors. Besides, as they rely on smoothness in the Fourier domain, via the spline parametrization, to bring localization in the vertex domain, their model does not provide a precise control over the local support of their kernels, which is essential to learn localized filters. Our technique leverages on this work, and we showed how to overcome these limitations and beyond.
items.zh: 其中B∈ℝ^{n×K}是三次B样条基，参数θ∈ℝ^K是控制点向量。他们后来提出了一种从数据中学习图结构的策略，并将该模型应用于图像识别、文本分类和生物信息学[13]。然而，这种方法由于需要乘以图傅里叶基U而无法扩展。尽管计算该矩阵（需要对图拉普拉斯矩阵进行特征值分解）的成本很高，但主要成本是在前向和反向传播中需要将数据乘以该矩阵两次（正向和逆傅里叶变换），每次计算复杂度为𝒪(n^2)，这是作者已经指出的计算瓶颈。此外，由于他们依赖傅里叶域中的平滑性（通过样条参数化）来在顶点域中实现局部化，他们的模型无法精确控制核的局部支持，而这对于学习局部滤波器至关重要。我们的技术借鉴了这项工作，并展示了如何克服这些限制及更多。

items.en: In the sequel, we refer to the non-parametric and non-localized filters (2) as Non-Param, the filters (7) proposed in [4] as Spline and the proposed filters (4) as Chebyshev. We always use the Graclus coarsening algorithm introduced in Section 2.2 rather than the simple agglomerative method of [4]. Our motivation is to compare the learned filters, not the coarsening algorithms.
items.zh: 在下文中，我们将非参数且非局部化的滤波器(2)称为Non-Param，将[4]中提出的滤波器(7)称为Spline，将本文提出的滤波器(4)称为Chebyshev。我们始终使用第2.2节介绍的Graclus粗化算法，而不是[4]中简单的凝聚方法。我们的动机是比较学习到的滤波器，而不是粗化算法。

items.en: We use the following notation when describing network architectures: FCk𝑘k denotes a fully connected layer with k𝑘k hidden units, Pk𝑘k denotes a (graph or classical) pooling layer of size and stride k𝑘k, GCk𝑘k and Ck𝑘k denote a (graph) convolutional layer with k𝑘k feature maps. All FCk𝑘k, Ck𝑘k and GCk𝑘k layers are followed by a ReLU activation max⁡(x,0)𝑥0\max(x,0). The final layer is always a softmax regression and the loss energy E𝐸E is the cross-entropy with an ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} regularization on the weights of all FCk𝑘k layers. Mini-batches are of size S=100𝑆100S=100.
items.zh: 在描述网络架构时，我们使用以下符号：FCk表示具有k个隐藏单元的全连接层，Pk表示大小为k且步长为k的（图或经典）池化层，GCk和Ck表示具有k个特征图的（图）卷积层。所有FCk、Ck和GCk层之后都跟随ReLU激活函数max(x,0)。最后一层始终是softmax回归，损失能量E是交叉熵，并对所有FCk层的权重施加ℓ2正则化。小批量大小为S=100。

items.en: This is an important sanity check for our model, which must be able to extract features on any graph, including the regular 2D grid. Table 1 shows the ability of our model to achieve a performance very close to a classical CNN with the same architecture. The gap in performance may be explained by the isotropic nature of the spectral filters, i.e. the fact that edges in a general graph do not possess an orientation (like up, down, right and left for pixels on a 2D grid). Whether this is a limitation or an advantage depends on the problem and should be verified, as for any invariance. Moreover, rotational invariance has been sought: (i) many data augmentation schemes have used rotated versions of images and (ii) models have been developed to learn this invariance, like the Spatial Transformer Networks [14]. Other explanations are the lack of experience on architecture design and the need to investigate better suited optimization or initialization strategies.
items.zh: 这是对我们模型的重要合理性检查，它必须能够在任何图上提取特征，包括规则的二维网格。表1显示，我们的模型能够实现与具有相同架构的经典CNN非常接近的性能。性能差距可能由谱滤波器的各向同性性质解释，即一般图中的边没有方向（如二维网格像素的上、下、右、左）。这是限制还是优势取决于问题，并且应该验证，就像任何不变性一样。此外，旋转不变性一直是被追求的目标：(i) 许多数据增强方案使用了图像的旋转版本，(ii) 已经开发了学习这种不变性的模型，如空间变换网络[14]。其他解释包括架构设计经验不足，以及需要研究更合适的优化或初始化策略。

items.en: The LeNet-5-like network architecture and the following hyper-parameters are borrowed from the TensorFlow MNIST tutorial222 https://www.tensorflow.org/versions/r0.8/tutorials/mnist/pros: dropout probability of 0.5, regularization weight of 5×10−45superscript1045\times 10^{-4}, initial learning rate of 0.03, learning rate decay of 0.95, momentum of 0.9. Filters are of size 5×5555\times 5 and graph filters have the same support of K=25𝐾25K=25. All models were trained for 20 epochs.
items.zh: 类似LeNet-5的网络架构和以下超参数来自TensorFlow MNIST教程：dropout概率为0.5，正则化权重为5×10^{-4}，初始学习率为0.03，学习率衰减为0.95，动量为0.9。滤波器大小为5×5，图滤波器具有相同的支持K=25。所有模型训练了20个epoch。

items.en: To demonstrate the versatility of our model to work with graphs generated from unstructured data, we applied our technique to the text categorization problem on the 20NEWS dataset which consists of 18,846 (11,314 for training and 7,532 for testing) text documents associated with 20 classes [15]. We extracted the 10,000 most common words from the 93,953 unique words in this corpus. Each document x𝑥x is represented using the bag-of-words model, normalized across words. To test our model, we constructed a 16-NN graph with (8) where zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} is the word2vec embedding [24] of word i𝑖i, which produced a graph of n=|𝒱|=10,000formulae-sequence𝑛𝒱10000n=|\mathcal{V}|=10,000 nodes and |ℰ|=132,834ℰ132834|\mathcal{E}|=132,834 edges. All models were trained for 20 epochs by the Adam optimizer [17] with an initial learning rate of 0.001. The architecture is GC32 with support K=5𝐾5K=5. Table 2 shows decent performances: while the proposed model does not outperform the multinomial naive Bayes classifier on this small dataset, it does defeat fully connected networks, which require much more parameters.
items.zh: 为了展示我们的模型在处理非结构化数据生成的图方面的通用性，我们将该技术应用于20NEWS数据集上的文本分类问题，该数据集包含18,846个文本文档（11,314个用于训练，7,532个用于测试），分为20个类别[15]。我们从该语料库中的93,953个独特单词中提取了10,000个最常见的单词。每个文档x使用词袋模型表示，并在单词间进行归一化。为了测试我们的模型，我们使用(8)构建了一个16-NN图，其中zi是单词i的word2vec嵌入[24]，生成了一个包含n=|𝒱|=10,000个节点和|ℰ|=132,834条边的图。所有模型均使用Adam优化器[17]训练20个epoch，初始学习率为0.001。架构为支持K=5的GC32。表2显示了不错的性能：虽然所提出的模型在这个小数据集上并未超越多项式朴素贝叶斯分类器，但它确实击败了需要更多参数的全连接网络。

full.sec: 4.3 Comparison between Spectral Filters and Computational Efficiency
full.secZh: 4.3 谱滤波器与计算效率的比较

items.capEn: Figure 4: Plots of validation accuracy and training loss for the first 2000 iterations on MNIST.
items.capZh: 图4：MNIST上前2000次迭代的验证准确率和训练损失曲线。

items.en: For any graph CNN to be successful, the statistical assumptions of locality, stationarity, and compositionality regarding the data must be fulfilled on the graph where the data resides. Therefore, the learned filters’ quality and thus the classification performance critically depends on the quality of the graph. For data lying on Euclidean space, experiments in Section 4.1 show that a simple k𝑘k-NN graph of the grid is good enough to recover almost exactly the performance of standard CNNs. We also noticed that the value of k𝑘k does not have a strong influence on the results. We can witness the importance of a graph satisfying the data assumptions by comparing its performance with a random graph. Table 5 reports a large drop of accuracy when using a random graph, that is when the data structure is lost and the convolutional layers are not useful anymore to extract meaningful features.
items.zh: 对于任何图CNN的成功，关于数据的局部性、平稳性和组合性的统计假设必须在数据所在的图上得到满足。因此，学习到的滤波器的质量以及分类性能关键取决于图的质量。对于位于欧几里得空间中的数据，第4.1节的实验表明，一个简单的网格k-NN图足以几乎完全恢复标准CNN的性能。我们还注意到k的值对结果没有强烈影响。通过将满足数据假设的图与随机图的性能进行比较，我们可以见证图的重要性。表5报告了使用随机图时准确率的大幅下降，即当数据结构丢失时，卷积层不再有用以提取有意义的特征。

items.en: While images can be structured by a grid graph, a feature graph has to be built for text documents represented as bag-of-words. We investigate here three ways to represent a word z𝑧z: the simplest option is to represent each word as its corresponding column in the bag-of-words matrix while, another approach is to learn an embedding for each word with word2vec [24] or to use the pre-learned embeddings provided by the authors. For larger datasets, an approximate nearest neighbors algorithm may be required, which is the reason we tried LSHForest [2] on the learned word2vec embeddings. Table 6 reports classification results which highlight the importance of a well constructed graph.
items.zh: 虽然图像可以通过网格图结构化，但对于表示为词袋的文本文档，必须构建特征图。我们在此研究三种表示单词z的方式：最简单的选择是将每个单词表示为词袋矩阵中对应的列，而另一种方法是使用word2vec[24]为每个单词学习嵌入，或使用作者提供的预训练嵌入。对于更大的数据集，可能需要近似最近邻算法，这就是我们在学习的word2vec嵌入上尝试LSHForest[2]的原因。表6报告了分类结果，强调了构建良好图的重要性。

items.en: In this paper, we have introduced the mathematical and computational foundations of an efficient generalization of CNNs to graphs using tools from GSP. Experiments have shown the ability of the model to extract local and stationary features through graph convolutional layers. Compared with the first work on spectral graph CNNs introduced in [4], our model provides a strict control over the local support of filters, is computationally more efficient by avoiding an explicit use of the Graph Fourier basis, and experimentally shows a better test accuracy. Besides, we addressed the three concerns raised by [13]: (i) we introduced a model whose computational complexity is linear with the dimensionality of the data, (ii) we confirmed that the quality of the input graph is of paramount importance, (iii) we showed that the statistical assumptions of local stationarity and compositionality made by the model are verified for text documents as long as the graph is well constructed.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了使用GSP工具将CNN高效推广到图的数学和计算基础。实验表明，该模型能够通过图卷积层提取局部和平稳特征。与[4]中首次提出的谱图CNN相比，我们的模型对滤波器的局部支持提供了严格的控制，通过避免显式使用图傅里叶基在计算上更高效，并且在实验上显示出更好的测试准确率。此外，我们解决了[13]提出的三个问题：(i) 我们引入了一个计算复杂度与数据维度呈线性关系的模型，(ii) 我们确认了输入图的质量至关重要，(iii) 我们表明，只要图构建良好，模型所做的局部平稳性和组合性统计假设对于文本文档是成立的。

items.en: Future works will investigate two directions. On one hand, we will enhance the proposed framework with newly developed tools in GSP. On the other hand, we will explore applications of this generic model to important fields where the data naturally lies on graphs, which may then incorporate external information about the structure of the data rather than artificially created graphs which quality may vary as seen in the experiments. Another natural and future approach, pioneered in [13], would be to alternate the learning of the CNN parameters and the graph.
items.zh: 未来的工作将探索两个方向。一方面，我们将利用GSP中最新开发的工具增强所提出的框架。另一方面，我们将探索该通用模型在数据自然位于图上的重要领域的应用，这可能会融入关于数据结构的外部信息，而不是像实验中那样使用质量可能变化的人工构建图。另一个自然的未来方法，由[13]首创，将是交替学习CNN参数和图。
